name: Autostrade Meridionali S.p.A.
summary: Autostrade Meridionali S.p.A. operates the Naples-Pompeii-Salerno motorway in Italy. Its motorway body maintenance activities include paving, green works, horizontal and vertical signs, plants, runways, and station buildings. The company was founded in 1925 and is based in Naples, Italy. Autostrade Meridionali S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Autostrade per l'Italia S.p.A.
